category_sources: source_facts.description says Deno is a secure runtime for JavaScript and TypeScript; official Deno homepage calls it an open-source JavaScript runtime.
display_name_sources: Official Deno homepage and GitHub repository use Deno as the display name.
docs_sources: Official Deno homepage links to the dedicated docs.deno.com documentation domain.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Deno homepage identify JavaScript/TypeScript runtime behavior, CLI/tooling, and secure-by-default execution.
